song.title: He Died and Lives
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I hear the words of love, I gaze upon the blood, I see the mighty sacrifice, And I have peace with God.
[V2] 2) ’Tis everlasting peace, Sure as Jehovah’s Name; ’Tis stable as His steadfast throne, For evermore the same.
[V3] 3) The clouds may go and come, And storms may sweep my sky; This blood-sealed friendship changes not, The Cross is ever nigh.
[V4] 4) My love is oft-times low, My joy still ebbs and flows; But peace with Him remains the same, No change my Savior knows.
[V5] 5) I change—He changes not; The Christ can never die; His love, not mine, the resting-place, His truth, not mine, the tie.
[V6] 6) The Cross still stands unchanged, Though heaven is now His home; The mighty stone is rolled away, But yonder is His tomb!
[V7] 7) And yonder is my peace, The grave of all my woes! I know the Son of God has come, I know He died and rose.
[V8] 8) I know He liveth now At God’s right hand above; I know the throne on which He sits, I know His truth and love!
song.author: Horatious Bonar
